risk_factors: Documentation update assumes version 1.0.0 is available in Maven Central without verification
No validation that updated version information is consistent across all referenced code examples
Version change may affect compatibility with existing user projects that depend on snapshot versions
positive_findings: Clear separation between release and snapshot repository configuration
Comprehensive Maven mirror configuration guidance to prevent common snapshot access issues
Well-structured documentation with proper tabbed examples for both Maven and Gradle
Addition of Maven Central repository example improves clarity for new users
risk_summary: This is a low-risk documentation update that changes version references from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0 release. The primary risk is ensuring the referenced version actually exists in Maven Central, but no security or functional code changes introduce vulnerabilities.
